synopsis:
NEWS, EXCLUSIVE FICTION, AND MORE!
FEATURING: STAR WARS: MAUL - SHADOW LORD! Sam Witwer discusses his return as the villainous former Sith
ROGUE ONE: A STAR WARS STORY 10TH ANNIVERSARY! Gareth Edwards, John Knoll, and Garry Whitta talk about the making of the movie
INTERVIEWS: Andor and Rogue One's Alistair Petrie (General Draven) and LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy director Chris Buckley
EXCLUSIVE STAR WARS SHORT FICTION By Lucasfilm's Phil Szostak
title: Insider #236
